title: Harden UI commands and right panel integration
goals: Normalize ui.open_right_panel once on the server side.
Execute only allow-listed UI commands in the browser.
Keep domain writes behind Django permissions, confirmation and audit.
non_goals: Do not add unrestricted frontend tool execution.
Do not bypass existing right sidebar endpoints.
Do not expose raw tool payloads to the user.
acceptance: ui.open_right_panel opens an allowed object in the right sidebar.
Forbidden or malformed UI commands are ignored or rejected safely.
Audit contains enough ids to trace the action without sensitive payload.
E2E covers at least one right panel command in CopilotKit mode.
